reboot.note: Reboot: continuing same session post-S1.7. Handoff/PKG already parsed this session (pkg_hash s1-e6f7a8, matches). npm run gate:full just ran clean (tests-green including 9 Engine tests).

select.note: Plan: 6 new test files under test/unit/ — Vec2.test.ts (algebra ops + no-mutation of operands + ZERO/normalize edge case), Rng.test.ts (determinism: same seed -> same sequence across independent createRng calls; no shared/global state; nextInt range + degenerate max<=min case), Clock.test.ts (accumulator banking exact-step boundary, MAX_FRAME_SECONDS spiral-of-death clamp drops excess not banks it, interpolationAlpha fractional progress, stepIndex monotonic), State.test.ts (NEUTRAL_INPUT shape, GameState generic-over-world compiles + readonly), StateManager.test.ts (only-mutation-point / commit swaps current+previous, freezeOnCommit throws on mutation attempt, idempotent re-commit of same object, getPreviousState before any commit equals initial). Files: test/unit/{Vec2,Rng,Clock,State,StateManager}.test.ts (Engine.test.ts already exists from S1.7). Proof: npm test green, full src/core+src/systems coverage.

plan.note: Anchor: new test files only, no source module internals touched. Type boundaries already captured from full reads this session: Vec2 (pure record ops), Rng (RngState{seed}, nextFloat/nextInt returning {value,next}), Clock (ClockState{accumulator,stepIndex}, advance returning {steps,next}, interpolationAlpha), State (GameState<TWorld>, InputFrame, NEUTRAL_INPUT), StateManager (getState/getPreviousState/commit, freezeOnCommit option, deepFreeze export).

anchor.note: Implement: 5 test files written (Vec2, Rng, Clock, State, StateManager). No source changes needed — all six core modules plus System already had complete production logic from prior slices.

implement.note: Verify: npm test green, 55/55 total (46 new: Vec2 x12, Rng x9, Clock x10, State x4, StateManager x11). typecheck clean. Coverage confirms documented contracts: Vec2 immutability, Rng determinism/no-globals, Clock banking+spiral-of-death clamp+interpolationAlpha, State generic-over-world, StateManager only-mutation-point/idempotent-commit/freeze-throws.

verify.note: Integrate: no PKG changes required — S1.8 only added tests for already-registered nodes (Vec2, Rng, Clock, State, StateManager, System via Engine), no new structural code, no new/changed dependencies. pkg_hash remains s1-e6f7a8. No new design decisions to record.
